texto: SummerThe seasons between spring and autumn, comprising in the Northern Hemispherethe warmest months of the year: June, July and August. The period of finest development, perfection, or beauty previous to any decline; the summer of life.― Cecilia Ahern
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cecilia Ahern sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “SummerThe seasons between spring and autumn, comprising in the Northern Hemispherethe warmest mon…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, seasons, transformation, útil em momentos de mudanca e transformation.
